channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gaza's solidarity with Spain amid conflict and celebration
item.description: The Spanish football team's World Cup victory has sparked joyous celebrations in Gaza, where their support for Palestinian rights has resonated deeply. Palestinians gathered in cafes and outdoor scree...

item.title: Scientists Discover New Bacterial Genotypes in Pygmy Sperm Whales Linked to Digestive Issues
item.description: Researchers at Florida Atlantic University's Harbor Branch Oceanographic Institute identified three previously unknown Helicobacter bacterial genotypes in pygmy sperm whales (Kogia breviceps) through ...

item.title: Mumias Voter Files Petition Against MP Peter Salasya Over Alleged Misconduct
item.description: A Mumias East voter, Fred Muka, has filed a constitutional petition at the High Court seeking to have MP Peter Salasya removed from office and compel an independent psychiatric assessment. The petitio...

item.title: Heavy rains cause fatalities and damage in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, authorities issue flood and landslide alerts
item.description: Heavy rains and flash floods have caused at least 12 deaths and 18 injuries across Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP) in the past 48 hours, according to the Provincial Disaster Management Authority (PDMA). The i...

item.title: Spain Celebrates Historic World Cup Victory with Nationwide Parade
item.description: Spain's national football team celebrated their second World Cup win on Monday, July 21, 2026, with a grand parade through Madrid. Over one million fans gathered to witness the celebration, waving red...

item.title: Nigeria's Oil Blocks See Increased Bidding Interest
item.description: The Nigerian Upstream Petroleum Regulatory Commission (NUPRC) organized a major commercial bidding event for oil blocks, attracting over 140 companies across 37 assets. The event highlighted Nigeria's...

item.title: Reading & Leeds Festival Removes BBC Introducing Stage After 18 Years, Introducing New Venues
item.description: The BBC Introducing Stage, a platform for emerging artists at the Reading & Leeds Festival, is being removed after 18 years as part of a major overhaul. The decision follows a significant expansion of...

item.title: Andrea Johnson Testifies at Madlanga Inquiry Regarding Allegations of Improper Conduct
item.description: Andrea Johnson, head of the Investigating Directorate Against Corruption (Idac), testified at the Madlanga commission of inquiry regarding allegations that she disclosed a criminal docket to Maj-Gen F...

item.title: Malacañang confirms no suspension of wage hike
item.description: The Philippine government, through Malacañang, has confirmed that there will be no suspension of the ongoing wage hike for workers. This announcement comes amid discussions about economic stability an...

item.title: Shania Twain Reflects on Childhood Struggles and Musical Evolution in Her 60s
item.description: Shania Twain, the iconic country music artist, has opened up about her challenging childhood and how her experiences have shaped her career. Born into poverty in rural Canada, Twain faced financial st...

item.title: Allahabad High Court Orders Due Process for Property Demolitions Amid Legal Dispute
item.description: The Allahabad High Court delivered a split verdict on whether to impose a two-year freeze on punitive demolitions of properties owned by accused individuals. Justice Atul Sreedharan advocated for a tw...

item.title: Simba Sports Club Signs Coastal Union Striker Bakari Msimu for 2026/27 Season
item.description: Simba Sports Club has bolstered its attacking options by acquiring striker Bakari Msimu from Coastal Union, marking a key addition to their squad ahead of the 2026/27 season. The transfer reflects the...

item.title: MAGA's Fractured Unity: Conspiracy Theories Fuel Internal Strife
item.description: The article discusses how the assassination of Charlie Kirk in September 2026 has led to deepening divisions within the MAGA movement rather than unification. Initially seen as a potential rallying po...

item.title: Idac director denies political motivations behind corruption probe against police chief
item.description: Investigating Directorate Against Corruption (Idac) head Andrea Johnson has categorically denied allegations that the corruption case against police crime intelligence head Lt-Gen Dumisani Khumalo was...

item.title: Tinubu reshuffles key agencies with Fayose leading Rural Electrification Agency
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has made significant appointments across Nigerian federal agencies, including naming former Ekiti State Governor Ayo Fayose as Chairman of the Rural Electrification Agency (REA)....

item.title: Instructions for accessing the Moorabbin weather article
item.description: The article explains that users may encounter a block message when accessing the Moorabbin weather content. News Corp Australia uses automated systems to manage crawler bot traffic. If users are not b...

item.title: Nawaz Sharif pledges development plans for AJK if PML-N wins elections
item.description: Pakistan Muslim League-Nawaz (PML-N) President Nawaz Sharif has pledged to prioritize Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) development if his party wins upcoming elections. Speaking to party workers in Muzaff...

item.title: President William Ruto Supports Grassroots Football Tournament in Kilgoris
item.description: President William Ruto recently visited his private Kilgoris farm to support a grassroots football tournament organized by his son, George Ruto. The event, held at the Intonnah Farm, attracted 24 team...

item.title: UST and Benilde advance in Shakey’s Collegiate Volleyball Tournament
item.description: The University of Santo Tomas (UST) and the College of Saint Benilde (Benilde) have made significant strides in the Shakey’s Collegiate National Invitationals (Shakey’s) volleyball tournament. UST’s v...

item.title: B.C. Conservatives raise concerns over southern pipeline route's impact on farmland
item.description: The article details how British Columbia's Conservative Party is voicing opposition to the proposed Alberta-Ottawa pipeline route passing through the fertile Fraser Valley. MLA Robyn Paton highlights ...
